productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Gavia Dark Brown Shoe
description: Casual rugged looks meet extreme comfort with the rockport Gavia. Engineered with adidas's adiPRENE technology, they are perfect for all-day wear. Durable and flexible with great shock absorbers, these shoes are a must-have if you believe in going that extra mile. Stylish shoes for a stylish man!Upper Full grain leather upper for added durability and style Rounded toe design for added sophistication Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Well padded tongue and collar for in-step cumfort and snug fit Brand name on collar and heel Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and support adidas adiPRENE footbed for highly shock-absorbent cushioning to protect the heel at impact Fabric inner for improved breathability Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption reducing foot fatigue Reinforced overlay on upper as a toe box for enhanced durability and protection to the forefoot Reinforced heel guard for added protection to the heel 3D adiPrene hologram on the heel guard Waffle pattern with grooves in the forefoot for better traction Flex grooves for better movement Mid foot arch support for ergonomic comfort Square lugs in the heel for better grip on various surfaces shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlight
